ValidationRule.description: Product and Opportunity Type are mandatory when stage is Proposal or beyond.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Proposal'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Demo'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Negotiation'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Quote Acceptance'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Funds (Negotiation)'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Advance Paid'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Won') ), OR( ISBLANK(Product__c), ISPICKVAL(Opportunity_Type__c, '') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Product and Opportunity Type are required from the Proposal stage onwards.
